name: 32 · xArm Trajectory Feedback Stream (ROS)
description: Streams the structured feedback of an xArm 6 FollowJointTrajectory action through a net consumer. Same `send_action_goal` to `/xarm6_traj_controller/follow_joint_trajectory` (`control_msgs/action/FollowJointTrajectory`) as demo 31, but with `streamOutput: true`: as the ros2_control controller follows the trajectory it publishes nested `FollowJointTrajectory_Feedback` frames (`{ header, joint_names, desired, actual, error }`) that the backend dedups and emits on the node's `stream` handle, where a StreamFold(Array) drains them gated on the control token's `stream_count`. End maps `feedback_count = {{ fold.output.len() }}` (the folded Array length) and `sample_frame = {{ fold.output[0] }}` (the first structured frame as raw JSON), proving rich, nested ROS action feedback survives the stream round-trip without depending on its inner field names. LIVE ONLY: requires `just dev xarm-up` to build the xArm 6 + rosbridge container and enroll an `xarm_fleet` runner advertising `ros.robot_model == xarm6`.
